pageDescription: Post a fintech role, whether you're the hiring manager, recruiter, or someone who knows them.
pageDescription2: Your listing gets AI-humanized, reviewed by a real person, and shared with a community that cares about fintech. Candidates can request warm intros. You decide who to talk to.
warmIntroCallout: Warm intros: candidates can ask me to connect them to you. They won't know if you respond. Zero pressure. Just give it a look if you see fit.
successBody: I'll review this carefully and get it live as soon as I can. No bots here.
